name: 3.14 IDLE
short_description: Unlock the digits of Pi in this addictive clicker game! Solve puzzles, boost your power, and search for rare patterns as you progress up to 100 million digits. Perfect for fans of math, strategy, and idle gameplay. Start your journey into the world of Pi today!
detailed_description:
How to Play:

  • Click the Formula: Tap to reveal the digits of Pi and unlock new milestones. Every click brings you closer to uncovering more of Pi's endless sequence!

  • Solve Equations: Want to boost your click power? Solve math problems and find the answers hidden in the digits of Pi you've already revealed.

  • Choose Your Path:

    • Solve equations for the highest rewards and faster progress.

    • Or search for specific numbers directly—it's easier, but you'll earn fewer points.

Game Features:

  • Milestone Rewards: Hit key milestones like 500, 1,000, or 10,000 digits to unlock powerful bonuses. Multiply your rewards, boost your income, and speed up your progress!

  • Rare Numbers: Find special patterns like "999999" or other rare combinations to earn huge rewards.

  • Boosts and Upgrades: Use temporary boosts to multiply your click power or passive income and plan your upgrades to keep progressing.

  • Simple Yet Addictive Gameplay: The intuitive interface makes it easy to jump in and start clicking while offering plenty of depth for strategic players.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish
